description.value:
A round shield of moderate size, typically constructed from layered wood and leather with metal reinforcement at the rim and center. The targe is a versatile all-purpose shield that balances coverage with maneuverability, offering solid defense against both melee and ranged attacks without the encumbrance of heavier designs.

Can be slung on back when not in use (takes 1 [Minor] action to ready).

system.specialAbilities: Can be slung on back when not in use (takes 1 [Minor] action to ready).
